objective: Make signature-target promotion readiness executable by auditing the Wave 44 heuristic rows for contract completeness and explicit promotion blockers.
non_negotiables: A passing row-contract gate is not a passing promotion gate.
The report must keep heuristic rows outside exact supervision.
Duplicate component signatures and result signature keys must remain zero before any future promotion work.
Duplicate current result value digests must be recorded as replay-rule pressure, not hidden.

tasks.prompt: Add a Partizan report command that audits heuristic signature rows for required output fields, contract IDs, diagnostic-only status, blocker IDs, duplicate signatures, and promotion status.
outputs: Smoke tests for pass and fail row-contract cases
acceptance: The report exposes a row_contract_gate separate from promotion_gate.
Well-formed diagnostic rows pass row_contract_gate and still keep promotion_gate.passed=false.
Rows missing required contract fields fail row_contract_gate.

tasks.prompt: Run the promotion-readiness report on the Wave 44 rpf20 heuristic diagnostic shard and record the artifact hash.
acceptance: The report includes 60 rows and row_contract_gate.passed=true.
Duplicate component signatures and duplicate result signature keys are zero.
promotion_gate.passed=false and all four blocker IDs remain present on all 60 rows.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 45 as an executable promotion-readiness gate and keep exact supervision blocked until a replay-compatible exact value rule exists.
acceptance: Docs distinguish row-contract readiness from promotion eligibility.
Claims C2 and C5 identify replay-compatible exact value semantics as the next blocker.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_45_signature_promotion_readiness.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 45 plan is internally consistent.
The Wave 44 diagnostic shard passes row-contract checks while promotion stays blocked.
